creator: kristinacors
caption:
Watch until the end if you want FREE tickets to the FIFA World Cup Final watch party in New York City hosted by @glblctzn 👀

Love that Global Citizen is making the beautiful game of soccer accessible to everyone in New York City ⚽️

And if you’re in NYC during the World Cup… this is your ultimate travel hack 👀

A FREE watch party for 60,000 people in Central Park for the FIFA World Cup Final + halftime show. #travelbucketlist #thingstodoinnyc #fifaworldcupfinal #fifaworldcup2026 #nycitinerary

transcription.text: If you're in New York City, you love the beautiful game, and you don't have tickets to the World Cup yet, you're gonna want to watch this. Because Global Citizen just announced that for the FIFA World Cup final and halftime show, they're hosting a completely free watch party in Central Park for over 60,000 people. I was in Central Park today to be announced, and just being surrounded by people who love this game the way I do, it brought me back. I've been playing soccer since I was 8, and for so long, it wasn't just a sport, it was part of who I was. They taught me discipline, resilience, and how to keep showing up even when no one was watching. They gave me a language I could speak anywhere in the world. A way to connect with people without saying a word. And now, the World Cup is coming to New York. If you want to be a part of this, tickets are free, but you have to register through Global Citizen. Registration opens June 11th at 10am and closes July 16th. So don't wait, because this isn't just about watching the game. It's about 60,000 people from different places with different lives, all feeling the same thing at the same time. Because that's what soccer does. It connects us. It moves us. It reminds us what it feels like to be alive. So save this video, send it to the friend you used to play with, and follow for more bucket list experiences that make you feel alive.
